benefits.description: Currently experiencing copper uglies (purge phase) - skin looks duller, breakouts occurring. Described as temporary 'looks worse before you get better' phase where old damaged collagen is broken down and replaced with healthier collagen

side_effects.description: Copper uglies - skin purge with breakouts and dullness, described as temporary cycle beginning phase

protocol_notes: Daily injection protocol with rotation in glutes only. No pain reported. Plans to stick with 8-week cycle minimum. Dosage: 12 units (with 3ml Bac water) = 2mg GHK-Cu per day.
